overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban environment. The character moves from a waterfront area with gang graffiti along a busy street with elevated highways, past commercial billboards and industrial structures, under bright midday sun.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with gang territory markings

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront sidewalk next to a large black building with white 6th Street gang graffiti

notable_agents.action: homeless person sitting on a bench against the building wall

entered.detail: large black building with white 6th Street gang logo and star graffiti
blue industrial container with bright pink neon signage
body of water running alongside the walkway
concrete bench with a seated figure resting against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow waterfront promenade bordered by a large black building with prominent white gang graffiti on the left and a canal on the right. A homeless person sits on a bench against the wall, and a blue container with pink neon sits ahead near the water's edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: main city street with elevated highway infrastructure

events.description: turns corner from enclosed waterfront walkway onto open main street with elevated highway structure
futuristic vehicles drive past on the multi-lane road to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to a busy street with massive elevated highway structures overhead

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive yellow support beams and curved highway overpass with red neon lighting underneath
green building with checkered racing flag pattern and industrial pipes
tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated
palm trees lining the street near the elevated highway

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to a wide city street dominated by a massive elevated highway structure with yellow supports on the left. The character walks along the sidewalk as futuristic vehicles pass by on the road, with a distinctive green industrial building and palm trees visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with large digital billboards

events.description: character crosses the multi-lane street at a crosswalk
passes by large digital billboards and solar panel installations on building rooftops

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a crosswalk and continuing along the sidewalk past commercial buildings with large advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in casual clothing walking in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'WASTE WORSE' advertisement with colorful graphics
building with blue solar panels installed on the roof
yellow automated vending machines against the building wall
large beige industrial shipping container with graffiti tags

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street and enters a commercial area dominated by large digital billboards including one for 'WASTE WORSE' and buildings with solar panels. An industrial container with graffiti becomes prominent on the right as the elevated highway recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial sidewalk with storage containers and recycling stations

events.description: passes by recycling bins and scattered trash next to a graffiti-covered industrial container

agents.ego_description: walking past an industrial container with extensive graffiti and recycling stations, approaching an intersection with elevated walkways

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red cap and dark jacket walking toward the camera

entered.detail: wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
industrial recycling containers with colored lids and warning labels
metal pedestrian bridge with red neon lights spanning across the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a grittier industrial section of sidewalk, passing a large container covered in graffiti and recycling bins. The area shows signs of urban decay with scattered trash, while an elevated pedestrian bridge with red neon lights looms ahead at the intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded waterfront promenade into a sprawling, gritty industrial city center. It begins beside a large black building marked with white gang graffiti and a quiet canal, passing a homeless person on a bench and a neon-lit blue container. As the character moves forward, the narrow path opens into a wide city street dominated by a massive elevated highway with yellow supports and passing futuristic vehicles. The scene then shifts into a commercial district filled with solar panels and large digital billboards, including one for WASTE WORSE, as the highway recedes into the distance. Finally, the environment transitions into a decaying industrial zone characterized by graffiti-covered containers and scattered trash before turning toward an elevated pedestrian bridge glowing with red neon lights.
